2606.16935.title: CrossMaps: Confidence-Aware Open-Vocabulary Semantic Mapping for Rover Navigation
2606.16935.paper_summary: Rovers rely on perception to maintain spatial maps that encode both objects and sensor quality (e.g., range reliability, lighting artifacts, data density), guiding data fusion, embedding updates, and navigation under partial observability. To study these coupled perception-navigation processes, we present CrossMaps, a real-time confidence-aware open-vocabulary semantic mapping pipeline that constructs language-queryable maps from RGB-D data. Building on VLMaps-style approaches, CrossMaps integrates multi-scale CLIP embeddings with confidence-aware fusion and a dual-memory architecture consisting of Short-Term Memory (STM) and Long-Term Memory (LTM). The STM aggregates noisy visual observations using geometric, semantic, and temporal confidence cues, while confident and coherent cells are promoted to the LTM as persistent semantic landmarks. Designed for deployment with a Jetson Orin-powered UGV alongside SLAM, CrossMaps runs in real time and produces semantic heatmaps that can be queried with natural language to guide rover navigation.
2606.16935.paper_summary_zh: Rovers 依賴感知來維持空間地圖，這些地圖編碼了物體和感測器質量（例如，範圍可靠性、照明伪影、數據密度），指導數據融合、嵌入更新和在部分可觀察性下的導航。為了研究這些耦合的感知-導航過程，我們提出了 CrossMaps，一個實時的信心感知開放詞彙語義映射管道，能夠從 RGB-D 數據構建可用語言查詢的地圖。基於 VLMaps 風格的方法，CrossMaps 將多尺度的 CLIP 嵌入與信心感知融合和由短期記憶（STM）和長期記憶（LTM）組成的雙記憶架構整合在一起。STM 使用幾何、語義和時間信心線索聚合噪聲視覺觀察，而自信且一致的單元則被提升到 LTM 作為持久的語義地標。CrossMaps 設計用於與搭載 Jetson Orin 的無人地面車（UGV）及 SLAM 一起部署，實時運行並生成可以用自然語言查詢的語義熱圖，以指導探測器導航。
2606.16935.author: Jan-Niklas Klein et.al.
2606.16935.authors: Jan-Niklas Klein, Sona Ghahremani, Christian Medeiros Adriano, Holger Giese
